title: 皐月賞の後に・最後まで一緒に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is unable to win the Satsuki Sho,
and her dream of winning the Triple Crown is
shattered.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this, she decides to continue running
amidst the cheers of the spectators.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She sets the Japanese Derby as her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At night, we catch sight of Rice Shower training
alone and telling herself that she'll catch up to
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon can't understand the reason for
her frustration and simply watches her, confused.
